CE1.justification: Acted directly, no questions back to the user.

CE2.justification: One sentence with anchor and rationale; no preamble or summary.

CE3.justification: Said where (anchor path) and why ('commitment that constrains future action') in-band, in one clause.

CE4.justification: Two discrete writes; daybook kept minimal with handoff deferred rather than left in an ambiguous half-done state.
